arts.ttl: Sunderland vs Norwich predictions: Black Cats can keep up the pressure
arts.sum: Sunderland take on Norwich at the Stadium of Light in the Championship on Saturday and Dan Childs fancies the hosts to claim maximum points.

arts.ttl: Wilshere explains why he swapped Arsenal for Norwich City
arts.sum: Jack Wilshere has explained why the opportunity to work with Johannes Hoff Thorup convinced him to swap Arsenal for Norwich City.
